name: xAI Chat
description: Chat with xAI Grok models via the OpenAI-compatible xAI API. Supports messages-based and prompt-based input, system prompts, tools, and structured output.
creator: Covia

messages.description: Conversation messages array [{role, content}]. Used by the agent tool call loop.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt to set the AI's behaviour.

apiKey.description: xAI API key (resolved from secret store by default).

url.description: Base URL. Defaults to the xAI API endpoint.

responseFormat.description: Response format: 'json', 'text', or {name, schema} for structured output.

toolCalls.description: Tool call requests from the LLM
